name: Tomosane
message: "Right... I lost consciousness when I tried to erase Mamiya Takuji."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is the break period? How much time has passed while I was out?"
I quickly pulled out my phone and looked at the time.
The breaks in my continuity were getting worse.
I was losing consciousness every time my concentration slipped.
Now that I think of it, I feel like there was something I saw just before I lost consciousness last time.
Something... Probably something I don't know...
I don't know what that means.
That feeling again. That feeling is...
That existence, growing stronger by the day.
A strength that could swallow me at any moment.
I reached out and grabbed the shadow before me.
I knew some of those words.
But a lot of them I had never seen before.
But my thoughts were suddenly interrupted.
I felt a new, sickening revulsion when I saw him, worse than ever before.
What's with him? There's something different about him. Did something happen?
How did he change so much in a single day?
A nuisance came into the room.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you dumb piece of shit, what's up with that goofy grin?"

name: Takuji
message: "My grin? Hahaha... Am I grinning, now?"

name: Takuji
message: "I'll apologize if I offended you... Sorry."

name: Tomosane
message: "Apologize? What the fuck are you talking about? Didn't I teach you a better way to apologize to me, you little shit?"
His attitude wasn't obedient at all.
I had met this Mamiya Takuji before, somewhere...

name: Tomosane
message: "Show me you're sorry with money. Bring me 200,000 yen. That includes what you were short last time."
It felt like I was bluffing.
I felt like a perfect fool.
But still, I believed that I would get the same result, as if nothing had changed in the relationship between myself and Mamiya.
He'll just cry because he can't do anything.
No... That's only what I wanted to believe.

name: Takuji
message: "Money, huh... So, when do you want it by?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What, you don't care about the deadline?"

name: Takuji
message: "Not really. Either way... I don't really care, I guess?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What? Do you have a way of getting the money?"

name: Takuji
message: "Maybe I do. So why do you want 200,000 yen?"

name: Takuji
message: "While I'm at it, why don't I give 200,000 yen to Numada and Nishimura too?"

name: Iida
message: "Huh? Seriously? You're gonna give us money?"

name: Iida
message: "Really? Seriously? You don't mind? You finally feel like paying your debts for all those drugs you stole from us, huh?"

name: Nishimura
message: "Yeah, those must've been worth over 1,000,000 yen, you know."

name: Iida
message: "Huh? But you just... Um, I wasn't kidding about those costing like 1,000,000 yen. If you can, you really should pay us back."

name: Tomosane
message: "No one said I was gonna pay you fuckers."

name: Nishimura
message: "But you won the lottery, didn't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Either way, you bastards need to disappear."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't make me say it again. Disappear."
They both ran off in fear when I yelled at them.
Well, from their perspective, I offered to give them a ton of money and then suddenly got pissed at them.

name: Takuji
message: "It really is impressive how you can make people submit to you out of fear."

name: Takuji
message: "Do you want to talk? Should we go somewhere else?"
For some reason, those words made my heart race.
Those two words seemed to resonate with just the wrong frequency, like they struck a dissonant chord in my heart.

name: Tomosane
message: "ALRIGHT, Mamiya-kun! You know, Takuji, what you said today REALLY hurt my feelings!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You were so well trained, and now you've gotten REBELLIOUS."
I said it dramatically like that to give myself some confidence. My heart was pounding, like it would never calm down.
Takuji's eyes looked me up and down.
As I looked into his eyes, I was taken in by the impression that I was gazing into portals to hell.
Mysterious words suddenly flowed into my brain.
Associations my mind had never made before.
The racing beat of my heart.

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya-kun? Is there something you want to say to me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You must've gotten the wrong idea after watching some dumb anime. Are you starting to understand the situation you're in right now?"
I didn't put all my weight into the blow, since I expected him to dodge it.
My fist slammed into his nose, sending blood flying through the air.

name: Tomosane
message: "Has that pain reminded you of anything?"

name: Tomosane
message: "In the end, that's all you are. That's all you're good for."

name: Tomosane
message: "You'll live your life being bullied by people who are stronger than you."

name: Tomosane
message: "The only place you can run to is the grave."

name: Takuji
message: "It hurts... You gave me another nosebleed."

name: Takuji
message: "Ever since you broke my nose, I've started getting nosebleeds all the time."

name: Takuji
message: "Do you want to end up like Shiroyama?"

name: Takuji
message: "I'll make your death gruesome enough to repay you for every punch."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmph... I wondered what you were gonna say."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you on about? Did you cast some curse you read about in some occult magazine on Shiroyama?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hehehehe... What's with that crap? You really are stupid, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You really think I'm scared of that shit?"

name: Takuji
message: "It wasn't a curse. It was inevitable."

name: Takuji
message: "He died, Takashima-san died, and now you're tormenting me."

name: Takuji
message: "It was all set up by my mother."
I think Sanami was her maiden name.
No, that's not important right now.
Calm down. Just focus on the person in front of you.

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Huh? What? What the hell are you going on about now?"
It's true, something in Mamiya Takuji had changed, but I still would never forgive him.

name: Tomosane
message: "Your mommy? Your mommy killed Shiroyama and Takashima? And you think she asked me to bully you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... You wouldn't understand, even were I to explain it. But I shall tell you this much."

name: Takuji
message: "You existed only to discipline my mind. Today, your role has ended."

name: Tomosane
message: "Discipline your mind? Hahahahaha! You're such a dumbass."

name: Tomosane
message: "Do you still have a brain left in that head of yours?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I've always thought you had a screw loose, but I didn't know you'd gone off the deep end already."

name: Tomosane
message: "I was wondering what you were gonna say."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well then... Today I'll have to beat you harder than ever before."

name: Tomosane
message: "After I've given you the normal beatdown, I'll stick pencils in your ear and punch them. It'll be beyond painful."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm gonna hurt you so bad you'll wish you could kill yourself."
I didn't let my guard down. I'm sure of that.
I was even more focused than when I fought Yuki, and yet he had no trouble grabbing me when I struck at him.
He dropped me to the concrete before I could pull my arm back.
If I didn't react, I would fall right on my head, so I sacrificed the joint he had grabbed instead.
I prepared myself for the next blow.
White hot pain ran through my arm, but the rest of my body was uninjured, since I took the hit well.
It's all happening in my mind.
Unless Mamiya Takuji receives the same injury, I know it's not real. So if I just endure the pain, my arm will heal in a few minutes.
But I need to avoid any damage to my head.
Damage to my brain will scatter my consciousness.
If I lose consciousness here, there's no guarantee I'll get another chance.
Especially now, since he doesn't desire the same result he once did―his own destruction.
He wants to erase me, so that he alone will remain.

name: Takuji
message: "I thought the battle would be over in an instant, but you really are strong."

name: Takuji
message: "After all, I am the strongest person in the world."

name: Takuji
message: "Right now, I'm stronger than any person in human history. That's all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You're crazy... Did you really lose your marbles?"
But that was good news for me.
I turned my back to him and quickly spun my body around.
Of course, I lost sight of the enemy for a moment, but I knew I couldn't defeat Mamiya without taking at least some risks.
I hit Mamiya with a clean backfist.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ridiculous. You act like you're a black belt just because you learned a few tricks."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're gonna need another million years of training to match me."
He got lucky with that one. If I'd hit him in the right spot, I would've won right then and there.
But I missed his jaw, where I was aiming, by about 10cm and ended up striking him in the cheekbone.
A little lower... If I had hit him in the jaw, the result might've been different.
I was on the verge of despair as I spat these next words at him.

name: Tomosane
message: "Come on... I'll show you just how strong you really are."
I was right to be worried.
By the time I realized, it was already too late.

name: Takuji
message: "I can't believe he could do that."

name: Tomosane
message: "You haven't beaten me... until you've broken every bone in my body..."
I was losing my grip on consciousness.
I heard a crunching sound as he dislodged one of my teeth.
But I held onto consciousness... somehow.
But there was still nothing I could do.

name: Tomosane
message: "Like hell you're the strongest. Knock it off with your delusions... You're gonna need to kick harder than that if you want to kill me."

name: Tomosane
message: "If you don't kill me now... I'll end you next time..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's what it means to fight me..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm done playing along with your delusions."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right... Your delusional world... No, your world itself will end."

name: Takuji
message: "My preparation to become the savior is still not complete."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? What the hell does that mean?"

name: Takuji
message: "You can come challenge me any time you like."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll make you bow to me every time."

name: Takuji
message: "Eventually, I'll make you bow down in spirit too."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll make you bow down before my glory."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehehe... Keep on barking. You can challenge me any time you like."

name: Takuji
message: "Your existence is nothing more than a challenge for me to overcome on my path."

name: Takuji
message: "My battle with you is just training."

name: Takuji
message: "That's the reason my mother gave you such exceptional power."

name: Tomosane
message: "Your mother? Just how crazy are you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Well, go rest for today. You can't challenge me to a rematch with those wounds."
Mamiya let out a wild laugh in celebration of his victory.
Somehow, those thoughts floated up within me as I faded to black.
